narrative:
Marietta 4C (precinct in Washington County) has 479 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.6 percentage points.
